violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Side of the fridge has spillage and needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Floor trim is bare wood and needs to be sealed, is not a smooth non-absorbent surface.
Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. Sanitizer spray bottle was measuring at >200ppm bleach.
